name: DaVinci MIQRO-C Vaporizer
summary: A pocket-sized conduction vaporiser for dry herb and concentrate pods, for patients who want a discreet device for smaller doses on the go.
description: The DaVinci MIQRO-C is one of the smallest proper vaporisers you can carry, at 87g and barely longer than a thumb. It runs the same ceramic and zirconia vapour path as DaVinci's larger devices, with a 50-221C range, four Smart Paths or single-degree control, and a Boost mode. The 0.3g oven suits lighter dosing, and USB-C gives up to around three hours of use per charge. For a UK patient who wants something genuinely discreet for microdosing or out-of-home use, this is a capable little device — just don't expect the runtime or session size of a full-size unit. Five-year warranty.
